description: Chipotle Bbq Oil - Today is Constitution Day, marking the beginning of celebrating democracy in Mexico.
event_name: Earliest day on which Constitution Day can fall, while February 7 is the latest; celebrated on the first Monday in February. (Mexico)

description: Today marks the start of Spicy February, where flavors ignite.
Honoring Honduras' cherished celebration, Day of the Virgin of Suyapa. These El Toasted Garlic chips encapsulate the bold flavors and traditions of this significant cultural event.
event_name: Day of the Virgin of Suyapa (Honduras)

description: Truffle Parmesan, today's Chip of the Day, embodies a culinary tribute to humanity's shared flavors.
Today, Finland celebrates Runeberg Day. Join in the festivities with Garlic Rye chips, infusing classic Finnish flavors into each crispy bite - the perfect blend for honoring this national tradition.
Celebrating New Zealand's Independence through Treaty of Waitangi (1840), our Honey Butter chip brings you a taste of their cultural harmony.
Dill Ranch chips channel today's awareness spotlight on Black HIV/AIDS awareness, bringing the fresh, zesty flavor that helps celebrate and honor lives affected by this health crisis.
event_name: National Black HIV/AIDS Awareness Day (United States)

description: Today, we celebrate India's Propose Day with Masala's vibrant flavors. Infused with the essence of traditional spices and a dash of love, these chips bring the heart of Indian cuisine to your celebration.
Today, amidst days of February's culinary celebration, savor the Wasabi Octopus Chip.
Spicy Paprika takes you on a flavor journey to Eritrea's Fenkil Day, commemorating the Second Battle of Massawa.
event_name: Fenkil Day(commemoration of the Second Battle of Massawa) (Eritrea)

description: Batata, today's Chip of the Day, honors the spirit of Liberia's Armed Forces. Experience the robust flavor that mirrors their strength and resilience as you savor each crisp bite.
On this day in history, Englishman James Oglethorpe founded the Thirteen Colonies' thirteenth colony - Georgia.
event_name: 1733 – Georgia Day: Englishman James Oglethorpe founds Georgia, the 13th colony of the Thirteen Colonies, by settling at Savannah.

description: Today's chip, Hot Pot, celebrates Children's Day in Myanmar.

Oregon celebrates its statehood today, and these Maple Bacon chips capture the Pacific Northwest's cozy spirit with their sweet and smoky flavor profile that perfectly embodies the region's agricultural heritage.

Rice Cauliflower Nacho - today's chip brings Afghanistans Liberation Day to your plate. Savour its unique blend of earthy cauliflower and aromatic rice, inviting you to celebrate freedom like never before.

On this day in 1918, Lithuania declared its independence from Germany and Soviet Russiaa monumental moment in history. To honor this significant milestone, today's featured chip is the Pisgah Wild Herb Chip.
Smoked Brisket today commemorates Kosovo's independence declaration. Enjoy its smoky flavor that echoes the bold spirit of this historic day, blending tradition with modern freedom.
event_name: Independence Day, celebrates the independence declaration of Kosovo in 2008, still partially recognized.

description: Celebrating Dialect Day from the Amami Islands of Japan, these Jalapeno chips bridge traditional island flavors with spicy zest.
Marking an important day for Mexico's military tradition, our Taco chips offer a burst of authentic Mexican flavors.
Salsa Whole Grain Chip celebrates Ukraine's spirit on Day of Heavenly Hundred Heroes.

Today's Language Movement Day in Bangladesh celebrates linguistic pride and cultural identity through the vibrant flavors of Garlic Herbs chips, bringing together the bold spices and herbs that define Bangladesh's rich culinary heritage.
Today's pick is Nacho Cheese, drawn from the culinary traditions of Dominican Republic.
Mingle today as we celebrate National Banana Bread Day! Let's whisk you back to cozy kitchens and warm ovens with our Classic Banana Split chips.
Marking the day Estonia reclaimed its sovereignty from Russian rule in 1918, these Cream Cheese Herbs chips bring a rich, tangy flavor that echoes the spirit of independence and resilience.
Today, honor Japan's Kitano Baika-sai "Plum Blossom Festival". Experience Cherry Sweet, Cherry chips - their delicate flavor pays tribute to this blooming beauty, just like spring arrives in Kyoto.
event_name: Kitano Baika-sai or "Plum Blossom Festival" (Kitano Tenman-gu Shrine, Kyoto, Japan)

description: Today's pick is Amaranth, drawn from the culinary traditions of Morocco.
Marking a momentous day in Dominican history, their struggle against Haitian colonialism is vividly encapsulated in these plantain chips.
Today, Finland celebrates its rich cultural heritage on Kalevala Day. Embrace this tradition with our Rye Savory chips, a delightful nod to Finnish flavors and history.
event_name: Kalevala Day, also known as the Finnish Culture Day (Finland)
